product_results.title: Feethit Mens Walking Sneakers Non Slip Lightweight Breathable Slip on Running Shoes Athletic Gym Tennis Shoes for Men

summary.text: Customers find these shoes comfortable and pleasant to wear. They describe them as very good shoes and a good product overall. The shoes are lightweight and durable. Customers appreciate their great looking appearance with an affordable, breathable, sleek look. However, some customers express disappointment with the lack of support. Opinions vary regarding the fit, slip-on feature, and durability of the shoes.

authors_reviews.title: Large, wide enough and very comfortable
authors_reviews.author: Virgi

authors_reviews.title: Good
authors_reviews.text: They're a good shoe. No real support if you're planning on using them on a treadmill or for running, but there comfortable and work well for an every day walking shoe.
authors_reviews.author: Greg

authors_reviews.title: Quality and well priced.
authors_reviews.text: Shoes are comfy and easy to slip on, husband loved them.
authors_reviews.author: Marie watson

authors_reviews.title: Definitely durable and comfortable.
authors_reviews.text: Lasted longer than any other pair of shoes (Oct 2024 - Jan 2026). I average about 10000 steps a day, inside and outside. After 14 months the sole separation from the upper part of the shoe. Buying a second pair today. They’re comfortable too. Most shoes last me about 6-8 months.
authors_reviews.author: Edi

authors_reviews.title: Bad product
authors_reviews.text: Supposed to be slip on shoes but the the opening of the shoe is so small that you can't get your foot in it
authors_reviews.author: Edward Derochie

authors_reviews.title: Not ankle supportive
authors_reviews.text: I have ordered these shoes in gray, navy and black. The shoes are comfortable but not supportive, you can easily twist your ankle and the shoes laces are too long and come undone, which becomes a trip hazzard. Each pair I have had to cut the shoes laces. For every day walking they are fine, widing a bike they are fine....but walking in a foot trail or any uneven ground is worriesome
authors_reviews.author: Rus

authors_reviews.title: Good quality runner!
authors_reviews.text: Nice fit, especially the wide toe area! The soles are not as soft as my Sketcher’s, but price is decent for an around the house/ yard work shoe.
authors_reviews.author: Dennis D.
